negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
1. ! [X0] : (can_transport_multiple(X0) => ~is_one_seater(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (is_tesla_model_3(X0) => can_transport_multiple(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (is_single_seat_electric(X0) => is_one_seater(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (is_solo_ev(X0) => is_single_seat_electric(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ~is_tesla_model_3(johns_car) => (~is_tesla_model_3(johns_car) & ~is_single_seat_electric(johns_car)) [input(axiom)]
6. ~is_solo_ev(johns_car) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~~is_solo_ev(johns_car) [negated conjecture 6]
8. is_solo_ev(johns_car) [flattening 7]
9. ! [X0] : (~is_one_seater(X0) | ~can_transport_multiple(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
10. ! [X0] : (can_transport_multiple(X0) | ~is_tesla_model_3(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
11. ! [X0] : (is_one_seater(X0) | ~is_single_seat_electric(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
12. ! [X0] : (is_single_seat_electric(X0) | ~is_solo_ev(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
13. (~is_tesla_model_3(johns_car) & ~is_single_seat_electric(johns_car)) | is_tesla_model_3(johns_car) [ennf transformation 5]
14. ~is_one_seater(X0) | ~can_transport_multiple(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
15. ~is_tesla_model_3(X0) | can_transport_multiple(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
16. ~is_single_seat_electric(X0) | is_one_seater(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
17. ~is_solo_ev(X0) | is_single_seat_electric(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
18. ~is_single_seat_electric(johns_car) | is_tesla_model_3(johns_car) [cnf transformation 13]
20. is_solo_ev(johns_car) [cnf transformation 8]
22. 1 <=> is_tesla_model_3(johns_car) [avatar definition]
24. is_tesla_model_3(johns_car) <- (1) [avatar component clause 22]
26. 2 <=> is_single_seat_electric(johns_car) [avatar definition]
27. is_single_seat_electric(johns_car) <- (2) [avatar component clause 26]
28. ~is_single_seat_electric(johns_car) <- (~2) [avatar component clause 26]
29. 1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 18,26,22]
30. is_single_seat_electric(johns_car) [resolution 17,20]
31. $false <- (~2) [forward subsumption resolution 30,28]
32. 2 [avatar contradiction clause 31]
33. can_transport_multiple(johns_car) <- (1) [resolution 24,15]
34. is_one_seater(johns_car) <- (2) [resolution 27,16]
35. ~can_transport_multiple(johns_car) <- (2) [resolution 34,14]
36. $false <- (1, 2) [forward subsumption resolution 35,33]
37. ~1 | ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 36]
s1. ~2 | 1 [sat_conversion 29]
s2. 2 [sat_conversion 32]
s3. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 37]
s4. ~1 [rat s3,s2]
s5. # [rat s1,s4,s2]
38. $false [avatar sat refutation s5]

% Termination reason: Refutation
